features: 【9 Light Modes & Memory Mode】Just one click, the controller holder switches between 9 lighting effect modes. It contains 7-color fast flashing, 7-color breathing light and single color light mode: red ,green, blue, purple, light blue, yellow, white, create a fantastic atmosphere for your gaming room. Long press for 2 seconds to turn off the light and memory mode will maintaining your favourite color.

【Detachable Controller Hook & Rotatable Headphone Stand】 Can hold one headphone and two controllers at the same time, or four game controllers. Suitable for all brand headphone sizes and compatible with a wide variety of controllers. The headphone holder can be 360° rotating and design with cable organizers to hold the headphone cable in place.

【Easy Installation & Portable Design】 Just assemble 3 parts together in 30 seconds, then you can get a stylish and beautiful headphone holder. After playing games, it is convenient to place or display headset and controllers, and keep your desk organized. The controller hook is detachable, make it be portable.

【More Stability and Protection】The controller stand has a stable base. It will not easily tip over when the controller is not on it. The 4 rubber pads on the bottom prevent slipping and protect your desktop surface. The soft protective rubber of the hook prevents scratche or damage your devices.

【Universal Compatibility & Safely Use】Plug and play, no driver needed, The headset stand compatible with WinXP/7/8/10 ,Linux, Mac and other operating systems. Hardened plastic outer shell of has excellent durability and this headphone hanger is with build-in one button for connecting or cutting off all circuitry and power supply, convenient and safe.
description: Product Description USB Connection Cable Plug & Play. Compatible with Win 2000,Win XP,WIN 7,WIN 8,WIN 10 and other operating systems. The length of the cable is 59in. Covered with Protective Pads Designed with full protective pads on all equipment hangers, keeping your gaming controllers or headsets from scratching and sliding. Base Anti-slip Pads There are 4 anti-skid pads under the base to provide excellent stability and prevent the headphone holder from tipping over. Headphone Cable Organizer The headphone hook with a headset cable organizer, which can holds your headset's cable in place to prevent it from dragging on the ground.
